title: henningia afghanica
side_effects: Henningia afghanica can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and headaches due to its toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's sap may cause skin irritation, including redness and blistering. Ingestion of the plant's leaves can lead to gastrointestinal problems, including diarrhea and abdominal pain. Improper use of the plant may also cause respiratory issues, including coughing and shortness of breath.
